items.title: Visa (V) Rated Outperform by Baird After $500M Escrow Financing Deal
items.description: Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) ranks among the best most active blue chip stocks to buy now. On December 24, Baird reiterated its Outperform rating on Visa Inc. (NYSE:V) with a $425 price target based on the company’s announcement of a $500 million financing for its litigation escrow account, which will result in revisions to the rate […]

items.title: Chris Hohn Posts Biggest Hedge Fund Gain Ever at $18.9 Billion. How He Did It.
items.description: The founder of TCI Fund Management ranks No. 1 for the net gain achieved in 2025, according to a ranking from the investment firm Edmond de Rothschild.

items.title: Visa Shares Slip As Trump Backs Credit Card Competition Act
items.description: Visa shares are marginally lower on Tuesday as the company faces pressure following a recent push regarding credit card regulations.

items.title: TreviPay Launches Pay by Invoice for Issuers Enabled by Visa Credentials
items.description: OVERLAND PARK, Kan., January 20, 2026--TreviPay launches its Pay by Invoice solution for Visa-issuing banks.

items.title: Thawani Pay signs credit card processing deal with Network
items.description: The partnership follows Thawani Pay’s recent progress in the card sector, including securing a Visa licence to issue credit cards.
